_comment: Copy this file to master_cv.json and fill in your real data. Never commit master_cv.json.
profile_summary: CS Engineer (Master's, Montpellier) with a strong background in network infrastructure and AI automation. I build end-to-end pipelines combining LLMs, data engineering, and system-level deployment.

roles.title: AI R&D & Automation Engineer (Internship)
highlights: Automated an AI-driven analysis system for insurance processing — what took days of manual work now runs in minutes (18,000+ Excel rows & 1,700+ PDF pages via OpenAI API and vector embeddings)
Generated 476 functional test scenarios via Multi-Agent CrewAI framework, freeing the QA team from repetitive work
Built AI-powered data extraction pipelines (PDF, Excel) using LLMs and vector embeddings

roles.title: Network Support Engineer & Automation Developer
highlights: Managed network and VoIP infrastructure for 1,500+ users — incident resolution, SLA compliance, 24/7 on-call
Built Python/SNMP automation scripts to manage 70 Cisco 2960 switches remotely, eliminating 70% of on-site interventions
Deployed SolarWinds dashboards for proactive monitoring — detected 30% of incidents before user reports
Wrote Bash scripts reducing diagnostic time by 40%; automated reporting pipelines via Python
Developed Python-based network analysis pipelines and automated reporting to reduce manual work by 70%
Created interactive Power BI dashboards for 1,500+ users to monitor real-time network health

projects.title: Multimodal AI Telegram Bot - Su6i-Yar
highlights: Personal AI assistant deployed on VPS — handles voice, image, finance and multilingual queries for daily use
8-layer LLM fallback system (Gemini/DeepSeek/Grok) for resilient responses
Built and benchmarked a full STT/TTS voice pipeline across cloud and open-source engines; shifted toward open-source stack for cost control
Async data pipelines for live finance tracking; multimodal engine with TTS & image generation

projects.title: Arix - Multi-Agent RAG for Technical Documentation
highlights: Built a multilingual multi-agent RAG assistant for technical maintenance documentation with context-aware retrieval
Implemented secure admin-gated ingestion workflow and FastAPI infrastructure mirroring CLI capabilities
Added hash-based incremental ingestion and Telegram admin notifications for operational reliability

projects.title: Farsi GPT-SoVITS Voice Cloning Lab
highlights: Fine-tuned and tested Persian TTS workflows around GPT-SoVITS and Fish-Speech for high-fidelity voice generation
Built end-to-end audio processing pipelines for segmentation, transcription, and dataset preparation

projects.title: Multi-Language Video Subtitle Generator
highlights: Implemented automated multilingual subtitle generation pipeline with Faster-Whisper STT and AI translation
Generated SRT/ASS outputs with typography corrections and optional FFmpeg subtitle rendering

projects.title: Telegram Video Automation
highlights: Architected a two-phase video scraper with structural discovery and content extraction
Implemented robust session management with self-healing Selenium drivers to bypass Cloudflare
Optimized startup performance via lazy loading and enhanced reporting with ASCII statistics tables

projects.title: Multi-Agent Job Applier
highlights: Developed an autonomous multi-agent system to discover, parse, and apply to relevant job postings

projects.title: Cisco Switch & IP Phone Manager
highlights: Network monitoring tool that detects failures before users report them — deployed on 70 Cisco switches
Evolved into full-stack app: real-time web dashboard, automated Telegram alerts, PostGIS geolocation
